phases.name: research
steps: scrape r/selfhosted top posts for dashboard pain points
scrape Dashy GitHub starred lists + forks for popular configs
identify top 8 niche personas (crypto, devops, homelab, SaaS, finance, productivity, media, business)

phases.name: generate
steps: for each persona: generate dashy.yml config with 15-25 curated widgets/links
generate preview screenshots via Playwright (deploy local Dashy + screenshot)
write Gumroad listing copy per config bundle

phases.name: package_and_list
steps: zip each config bundle with README + install instructions
stage in PRODUCTS/GUMROAD_INSTANT_UPLOAD/ with listing MD
wire Stripe payment link per product
